docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE PER THE CURRENT RESIDENT OF THE ADDRESS, DEFENDANT DOES NOT LIVE AT THE ADDRESS PROVIDED BY THE PLAINTIFF. FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOLMES, IAN AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, HUIJU AS TRUSTEE OF THE HUIJU CARRIE CHEN LIVING TRUST

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-05-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-05-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF IAN HOLMES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HUIJI CHEN AS TRUSTEE OF THE HUIJI CARRIE CHEN LIVING TRUST CALIFORNIA STATE REALTY, INC. IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,590.00 FILED BY HOLMES, IAN AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, HUIJU AS TRUSTEE OF THE HUIJU CARRIE CHEN LIVING TRUST CALIFORNIA STATE REALTY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-18-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE REALTY, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ALEXANDRA MOARI FILED BY DEFENDANT CHEN, HUIJU AS TRUSTEE OF THE HUIJU CARRIE CHEN LIVING TRUST
REMARK: RECEIVED MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON JAN 22, 2026. SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO IAN HOLMES RETURN TO SENDER -ATTEMPED NOT KNOWN- UNABLE TO FORWARD.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-05-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOLMES, IAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEN, HUIJU AS TRUSTEE OF THE HUIJU CARRIE CHEN LIVING TRUST CALIFORNIA STATE REALTY, INC. $2,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $286.20 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,986.20 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-25-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $186.20 AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, HUIJU AS TRUSTEE OF THE HUIJU CARRIE CHEN LIVING TRUST
